label: Pawn expectations quality offset
description: Maps an ExpectationDef to a quality offset value inside RitualOutcomeComp_PawnExpectations. Loaded via LoadDataFromXmlCustom: the element name is the ExpectationDef defName; scalar text is the offset.

expectation.label: Expectation
expectation.description: ExpectationDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Quality offset applied when a pawn matches this expectation level. Populated from scalar element text by the keyedObjectList loader.
